name: Chewy Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a cookie sheet lightly with shortening.
3. In a large bowl, combine the shortening and brown sugar; beat in the egg,
milk, and vanilla until well blended.
4. Gradually add the oats, flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon to the
shortening mixture; mix until just combined.
5. Stir in the raisins and walnuts.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto the prepared cookie sheet,
spacing them about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 10-13 minutes, or until lightly browned. Cool on a wire rack
for 2 minutes before removing from the oven.
